property.name: http.agent.description
property.value: Academic crawl for Persian web graph analysis (University of Tehran assignment)

property.name: http.content.limit
property.description: 1 MiB per page. Liferay pages can be large; the default 64KiB truncates them mid-template and drops outlinks.

property.name: fetcher.server.delay
property.description: Politeness: 0.5 second between requests to the same host. Multiple seeds across subdomains let us fetch in parallel without hammering any one host.

property.name: db.max.outlinks.per.page
property.description: Cap outlinks per page. 400 fits the Sharif homepage (200+ links) without truncating real navigation.

property.name: db.ignore.external.links
property.description: Stay inside the seed domain — internal links only.

property.name: db.ignore.external.links.mode
property.description: byDomain so links across *.sharif.ir subdomains stay in-scope.

property.name: parser.skip.truncated
property.description: Don't drop a parse just because the content was truncated — keep its outlinks.

property.name: link.ignore.internal.host
property.description: Keep within-host edges so the resulting graph is non-trivial.

property.name: generate.max.count
property.description: At most 1000 URLs per host per generate round. Caps any one subdomain from monopolising the fetchlist.

property.name: db.fetch.interval.default
property.description: 30 days. Default is 30 days too; making it explicit so refetch behaviour is predictable.
